theme_notes: Touchstones: US-Iran war ceasefire on 'massive life support' as Trump rejects Tehran's proposal as 'piece of garbage' ($29B war tab); Trump flies to Beijing for state visit with Xi (Taiwan, trade on agenda); Nigel Farage's Reform UK sweeps 1,450 British council seats as Labour implodes; Devil Wears Prada 2 just released; PSG vs Arsenal Champions League final looming (Budapest, May 30).
settled: Closer to zero than the Iran ceasefire. Low bar, but you cleared it.
The books balance. Miranda Priestly is still watching. Spend nothing stupid.
Practically square. The Pentagon hasn't managed that in decades.
youOwe: Less than a barrel of oil cost before Trump started a war. You're fine.
A rounding error on the Iran war tab. Your conscience can rest.
Even Farage wouldn't bother campaigning against you for this.
That's a tank of gas at war-inflated prices. Respect the number.
Your debt has more life support than the Iran ceasefire. Not a flex.
Keir Starmer lost 1,500 councillors. You've lost your partner's patience. Same energy.
Devil Wears Prada 2 tickets ran less than this. Miranda would still fire you.
More red lines on your balance sheet than a Trump-Tehran negotiation draft.
Xi's hosting Trump. Your partner's hosting your debt. Neither arranged this willingly.
The ceasefire is on 'massive life support.' Your excuse shares a ward.
Trump called Tehran's offer 'stupid and unacceptable.' Your payment plan is next.
PSG is preparing for Budapest. You're preparing a longer excuse.
The Pentagon spent $29 billion on the Iran war. You're funding something less defensible.
The ceasefire collapses and restarts on a schedule. So does your repayment plan.
Trump flew to Beijing for the biggest summit in years. Your partner deserves a text.
The Iran war hit $29 billion. You're clearing a measurable percentage. Solo.
PSG's Champions League prize pool is smaller than this. Still no trophy for you.
The final is May 30. Your debt is older than that and somehow less resolved.
theyOwe: Tiny. You remember. You always remember.
Less than a post-war fill-up. The principle costs more than the amount.
Miranda Priestly has fired people for exactly this kind of behavior.
That's war-premium gas money. Don't let them call it trivial.
Enough to matter. Not enough for them to act on. Classic move.
Iran rejected the ceasefire terms. Your partner rejected the concept of repayment.
You funded their Devil Wears Prada 2 night out. No review. No repayment.
You've been more patient than any party in the current Middle East.
PSG needed a miracle to reach Budapest. You'll need one to collect this.
Your generosity is on life support. The prognosis is not optimistic.
Reform UK won 1,450 seats with less entitlement than your partner shows.
You've shown more restraint than Trump at a ceasefire table. That's genuinely wild.
The Pentagon tracks every Iran war dollar to the billion. Track this one.
Enough for business class to Beijing and back. They owe you the upgrade.
Arsenal reached the final on less borrowed goodwill than you've extended.
The Iran war has no end date. This debt is developing the same characteristic.
Trump renegotiated world trade in Beijing. You just want one dinner repaid. Sadder.
Your partner owes enough that Xi Jinping would request a bilateral.
